productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Silver Dial Casual Watch
description: Inspired by pretty women and femininity, this fastrack watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial. Minimalist design, square face and a leather strap to give it a modern feel backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and casual sandals or shoes.Case diameter: 28 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: SquareSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortGenuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite dial with branding at the 12 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands or in light rain
